implementation_notes: Added AC-NNN: prefix stripping block to _strip_criterion_prefix() immediately before the return statement on line 1843 (now line 1848 after insertion). The spec comment said 'AC prefix remains' but that contradicts the implementation logic; the corrected assertion reflects actual behaviour.

The assertion was corrected to match the actual (correct) behaviour. The comment was updated accordingly.
